commands.command: clk115 status
commands.description: Print workspace, current user, and running timer.

commands.command: clk115 doctor
commands.description: Check local CLI configuration without contacting Clockify.

commands.command: clk115 start [description] [-p project] [-t task] [--tag tag…] [--billable]
commands.description: Start a timer. Resolves project, task, and tag names to IDs.

commands.command: clk115 stop
commands.description: Stop the running timer for the current user.

commands.command: clk115 log <duration> <description> [-p project] [-t task] [--tag tag…] [--billable] [--end iso]
commands.description: Log a finished entry. Resolves project, task, and tag names to IDs. Duration accepts `1h30m`, `90m`, or `PT1H30M`.

commands.command: clk115 entries list [--limit N] [--page N] [--from YYYY-MM-DD] [--to YYYY-MM-DD] [--description text]
commands.description: List time entries for the current user.

commands.command: clk115 entries delete <id>
clk115 projects list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived] [--client id]
clk115 projects create <name> [--client id] [--color hex] [--billable]
clk115 clients list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived]
clk115 clients create <name> [--note text]
clk115 tasks list <projectId> [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text]
clk115 tags list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text] [--archived]
clk115 tags create <name>
clk115 webhooks list [--type type]
clk115 webhooks create --name X --url U --event E [--trigger-source-type T --trigger-source ids]
clk115 webhooks delete <id>
clk115 invoices list
clk115 invoices create --client id --number N --currency USD --issued YYYY-MM-DD --due YYYY-MM-DD [--time-view-mode mode]
clk115 expenses list [--limit N] [--page N] [--start YYYY-MM-DD] [--end YYYY-MM-DD]
clk115 timeoff list [--page N] [--limit N] [--start date] [--end date] [--status APPROVED,PENDING,…] [--user ids]
clk115 timeoff submit --policy id --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD [--days N] [--note text] [--half-day --half-day-period FIRST_HALF|SECOND_HALF]
commands.description: Submit a time-off request against a policy.

commands.command: clk115 scheduling list [--limit N] [--page N] [--name text]
clk115 scheduling create --user id --project id --start date --end date --hours-per-day N [--task id --note text --billable --include-non-working-days --publish]
commands.description: Create a scheduling assignment. Drafts by default; pass `--publish` to publish.

commands.command: clk115 audit-log search --start RFC3339 --end RFC3339 --actions A,B,… [--authors ids --authors-mode CONTAINS|DOES_NOT_CONTAIN --page N --limit N]
commands.description: Search the workspace audit log. Window must be ≤ 31 days.

commands.command: clk115 api <method> <path> [-q key=value…] [-H key=value…] [--body json|@file|-] [--all] [--page-size N] [--max-pages N] [--include-headers]
commands.description: Call a Clockify API path directly through the SDK client. Fills {workspaceId} from --workspace or CLOCKIFY_WORKSPACE_ID.

commands.command: clk115 completion [zsh|bash|fish]
commands.description: Print a shell completion script for zsh, bash, or fish.

commands.command: clk115 help [command]
clk115 --version
